reason: The Shining’s isolated hotel grooms madness in claustrophobic terror
Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs hides creeping dread under fairy-tale calm
Nadja’s gothic mansion warps reality in uncanny isolation
Diabolique’s schoolhouse nestles malevolent architecture and paranoia
